executives.name: Tomer Weingarten
executives.background: Tomer Weingarten is one of our co-founders and has served as our President and Chief Executive Officer and as a member of our board of directors since our inception in January 2013. Prior to SentinelOne, Mr. Weingarten led product development and strategy for the Trusteer subsidiary of IBM. He also co-founded and served as Vice President of Engineering of Carambola Media.

executives.name: Dave Bernhardt
executives.background: Dave Bernhardt has served as our Chief Financial Officer since September 2020. Prior to joining SentinelOne, Mr. Bernhardt served as Vice President, Finance of Chegg, Inc. from 2012 to 2020. Previously, he served as Vice President, Finance and Corporate Controller of Palantir Technologies.

executives.name: Ric Smith
executives.background: Ric Smith has served as our Chief Product and Technology Officer since March 2021. Prior to joining SentinelOne, Mr. Smith served in various roles at Medallia, Inc., including as Senior Vice President of Engineering. Previously, he held various engineering leadership roles at Oracle Corporation.

executives.name: Keenan Conder
executives.background: Keenan Conder has served as our Chief Legal Officer and Corporate Secretary since September 2021. Prior to joining SentinelOne, Mr. Conder served as Executive Vice President, General Counsel and Corporate Secretary of Tableau Software, Inc. from 2012 to 2021.

tenure_dates.title: Chief Legal Officer and Corporate Secretary

board_of_directors.name: Tomer Weingarten
board_of_directors.background: Co-founder, President, and CEO of SentinelOne.

board_of_directors.name: Charlene T. Begley
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Begley served in various capacities at General Electric Company from 1988 to 2013, including as a Senior Vice President and Chief Information Officer. She currently serves on the boards of Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc. and Nasdaq, Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Robert S. Switz
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Switz has served as the Chairman of the Board of Micron Technology, Inc. since 2012. He previously served as the President and CEO of ADC Telecommunications, Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Mark S. Peek
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Peek has served as a Managing Director of Workday Ventures since 2018. He previously served as Co-President and CFO of Workday, Inc. and as CFO of VMware, Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Jeffrey J. K. Linden
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Linden has served as the Chief Operating Officer of Redesign Health since 2021. He previously served as the Chief Legal Officer of Airbnb, Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Danielle J. Brown
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Brown has served as the Chief People Officer of Gusto, Inc. since 2020. She previously served as the Chief Diversity and Inclusion Officer of Google.
